# GhostWorkersCompInsurance.com — LLMs.txt

## Site Overview
GhostWorkersCompInsurance.com is a specialized insurance agency website focused on ghost workers compensation insurance. The site helps independent contractors, sole proprietors, and small business owners obtain workers comp coverage quickly — in minutes rather than days. Operated by Contractors Choice Agency LLC, a licensed insurance agency.

## Business Information
- **Business Name:** GhostWorkersCompInsurance.com (operated by Contractors Choice Agency LLC)
- **License Status:** Licensed insurance agent in 47 states
- **Phone:** 844-967-5247
- **Email:** quotes@ghostworkerscompinsurance.com
- **Service Area:** All U.S. states except monopolistic states (ND, OH, WA, WY)
- **Specialty:** Ghost workers compensation policies — instant quotes, same-day certificates

## What Is a Ghost Workers Comp Policy?
A ghost workers compensation policy is a legitimate workers' comp insurance product for business owners who have zero employees (or exclude themselves from coverage). It provides a certificate of insurance satisfying contractor licensing requirements without insuring actual employees. Premiums typically range from $800–$2,500/year.

## Key Pages

### Homepage
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/
**Description:** Main landing page emphasizing instant quotes and same-day certificates. Includes hero section, how-it-works (4 steps), services grid, testimonials, and FAQ.

### Get a Quote
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/quote
**Description:** 3-step quote form collecting contact info, business details (state, trade, years in business), and coverage preferences (limits, start date, additional insured).

### About
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/about
**Description:** About Contractors Choice Agency — mission, specialization in ghost WC policies, carrier partners, and licensing.

### Contact
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/contact
**Description:** Contact form plus direct phone and email for quote inquiries. Office hours Mon–Fri 8am–6pm CT.

### Blog
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/blog
**Description:** Resource center with guides on ghost WC policies, same-day certificates, cost information, and state-specific requirements.

## Coverage Pages

### Ghost WC Policy
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/services/ghost-wc-policy
**Description:** What is a ghost workers comp policy, who needs it, how it works, state availability, and cost factors.

### Same-Day Coverage
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/services/same-day-coverage
**Description:** How same-day workers comp coverage works, application process, binder vs certificate, timeline.

### Employer Audit Defense
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/services/employer-audit-defense
**Description:** Workers comp audit defense, how ghost policies minimize audit exposure, documentation guidance.

### Payroll Protection
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/services/payroll-protection
**Description:** How payroll affects WC premiums, ghost policy advantage, flex premium structures.

### Contractor Ghost Coverage
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/services/contractor-ghost-coverage
**Description:** Ghost coverage for independent contractors and 1099 workers, contractor license requirements by state.

### Instant Certificates
**URL:** https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/services/instant-certificates
**Description:** Instant COI delivery, additional insured endorsements, electronic delivery process.

## Legal
- Privacy Policy: https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://ghostworkerscompinsurance.com/terms

## Important Coverage Notes
- Ghost WC policies are NOT available in monopolistic states: North Dakota, Ohio, Washington, Wyoming
- Coverage quotes are estimates; final premiums determined by carrier underwriting
- This site provides insurance services, not legal advice
- All policies placed with A-rated or better carriers
